description:

Baseline compile passed before edits; sqlc generation is reproducible with no diff; cd apps/api && go test ./internal/repository/postgres -run TestNew_ReturnsErrorForBadPort -count=1 passed. Spec re-review and quality re-review approved after fixing reorder helper safety and nullable update flags.

title: W03 implementation: DailyLog/workout migrations
description:

acceptance_criteria: Migrations create daily_logs, workout_exercises, workout_sets exactly within WAVE-03 scope; UNIQUE(user_id,date), version CHECK, ordering constraints, set validation CHECKs, FK behavior, and focused migration smoke evidence are present.

Verification: cd apps/api && go test ./internal/repository/postgres -run 'TestWorkoutMigrations|TestNew_ConnectsAndPings' -count=1 passed; xmllint --noout docs/verification-plan.xml passed. Spec re-review and quality re-review approved.

title: WAVE-03 Workout Diary backend
description:

Scope boundary: DailyLog canonical daily container, strength workout logging, Date scalar/model binding, migrations, sqlc, repository, service, GraphQL schema/resolvers, runtime wiring, GRACE docs, focused verification, full coverage closure, and pre-MR QA/readiness.

Closure contour: implementation-ready with branch-pushed delivery. No MR creation unless separately requested.

Definition of readiness: implementation, full test coverage, and pre-MR QA child epics are all complete; source plan requirements are mapped; required checks are run or blockers recorded with evidence.

title: Implement WAVE-03 workout diary backend
description: Implement the approved WAVE-03 workout diary backend plan from docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-03-workout-diary.md. Scope: DailyLog, workout exercises, workout sets, optimistic versioning, Atlas GraphQL. Excludes cardio, body weight, charts, AI export, and frontend.

title: Final MR readiness packet
description:
**Source:** docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md Handoff Packets

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Produce release/MR readiness packet including:
- What was implemented: summary of all WAVE-02 outcomes
- Source plan used: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md
- Commands run and results (test, codegen, lint, graphql validate)
- Typecheck/build/lint status
- All 22 TEST-W02 obligations passing evidence
- E2E/runtime evidence (round-trip test)
- No-regression proof for WAVE-01 admin auth
- Docs/artifacts updated (GRACE docs if applicable)
- Remaining blockers or accepted risks (if any)
- Delivery mode: branch-pushed (do not push unless user requests MR)

**Delivery mode:** implementation-ready (no push unless user requests MR)

title: Backend/storage/security review
description:
**Source:** docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md Security Privacy And Compliance section

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Independent review of:
- Server-side MIME detection works (not trusting Content-Type)
- UUID-based file paths prevent traversal
- User-scoped operations (user_id FK everywhere)
- Soft archive does not cascade media delete
- Working weight CHECK at DB level enforced
- File deletion soft-fail on error (log + 204)
- No sensitive content logged
- PIN auth guards all endpoints (including PIN-disabled fallback)
- Log markers exist for [Exercise][create|update|archive|restore|get|list] and [Media][upload|download|delete]

**AC:** All security/privacy/compliance requirements from the wave detail verified.

title: Full test suite, codegen drift, lint, graphql validation
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 12); docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md EC-W02-002, EC-W02-003, EC-W02-007, EC-W02-009, EC-W02-010, EC-W02-011

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Run all quality gates:
1. Full test suite: `bunx nx run api:test`
2. Codegen drift check: `bunx nx run api:codegen && bunx nx run api:codegen:atlas`
3. Lint: `bunx nx run api:lint`
4. GraphQL schema validate: `bunx nx run graphql:validate`
5. WAVE-01 regression: `bunx nx run api:test -- --run "(?i)admin_auth"`
6. All migration tests pass (EC-W02-008)
7. Exercise CRUD log markers present (EC-W02-010)
8. No sensitive content in logs (EC-W02-011)
9. File size/type validation enforced (EC-W02-009)

**AC:** All commands pass with no failures.

title: Traceability audit: source plan → coverage matrix → acceptance criteria
description:

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Audit that every AC-W02-001 through AC-W02-027 has a corresponding test. Verify TEST-W02-001 through TEST-W02-022 each map to a committed test file and pass. Verify EC-W02-001 through EC-W02-013 are met. Verify all design contracts (DDEC-W02-001 through DDEC-W02-004) are enforced.

**AC:**
- All 27 ACs and 13 ECs covered by passing tests
- Design contracts verified in code
- No scope creep: excluded scope items not implemented

title: Auth, NotFound, migration, codegen drift, lint, log privacy tests
description:
**Source:** docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md TEST-W02-013, TEST-W02-014, TEST-W02-005, TEST-W02-006, TEST-W02-015, TEST-W02-016, TEST-W02-017, TEST-W02-018, TEST-W02-019, TEST-W02-020, TEST-W02-022

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Remaining verification obligations:
- Auth error for missing/invalid PIN session (TEST-W02-013)
- NotFoundError for missing/wrong-user (TEST-W02-014)
- Migration smoke test up+down (TEST-W02-005)
- Codegen drift: sqlc + atlas gqlgen (TEST-W02-006)
- File type/size/path traversal validation (TEST-W02-015/016/017)
- Log privacy: personalNotes not in logs (TEST-W02-018)
- Go lint (TEST-W02-019)
- GraphQL schema validate (TEST-W02-020)
- WAVE-01 admin auth regression (TEST-W02-022)

**AC:** All commands pass:
- `bunx nx run api:test -- --run "(?i)(exercise_auth|exercise_not_found|migration|media_filetype|media_filesize|media_path_traversal|exercise_log_sanitize|admin_auth)"`
- `bunx nx run api:codegen && bunx nx run api:codegen:atlas`
- `bunx nx run api:lint`
- `bunx nx run graphql:validate`

title: Soft archive, pagination, filter, round-trip integration tests
description:
**Source:** docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md TEST-W02-008, TEST-W02-009, TEST-W02-010, TEST-W02-011, TEST-W02-012, TEST-W02-021

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Focused integration tests for:
- Soft archive does NOT cascade media delete (AC-W02-026, DDEC-W02-001) 
- isActive filter: default excludes archived, includeInactive=true includes (AC-W02-008, AC-W02-010)
- List pagination cursor behavior (AC-W02-004)
- Duplicate exercise names allowed (AC-W02-013)
- Exercise field update persistence (AC-W02-006)
- Round-trip: create → upload media → verify → delete media → archive → restore → verify (EC-W02-012)

**AC:** All pass via focused test patterns
- Run: `bunx nx run api:test -- --run "(?i)(exercise_archive|exercise_active_filter|exercise_pagination|exercise_duplicate_name|exercise_update|exercise_roundtrip)"`

title: ExerciseMedia integration tests via WAVE-01 media scaffold
description:
**Source:** docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md TEST-W02-004

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Test media upload/download/delete through WAVE-01 media scaffold routes with purpose/entity routing. Test MIME validation (AC-W02-022), size validation (AC-W02-023), file name sanitization (AC-W02-024), auth (AC-W02-021), path traversal prevention.

**AC:**
- Valid upload with EXERCISE_MEDIA purpose succeeds
- Invalid MIME types rejected
- Oversized files rejected
- Missing exerciseId rejected
- Download returns correct content type
- Delete removes DB record, returns 204
- Physical file deleted (soft-fail on error)
- Run: `bunx nx run api:test -- --run "(?i)atlas_media"`

title: GraphQL resolver integration tests (exercise_resolver_test.go)
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 11); docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md TEST-W02-003

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Resolver integration tests covering: create exercise (AC-W02-001), read by ID (AC-W02-002), paginated list (AC-W02-003), cursor behavior (AC-W02-004), update (AC-W02-005), archive (AC-W02-007), restore (AC-W02-011), exercise(id) with union result (AC-W02-009), NotFoundError (AC-W02-027), AuthError (AC-W02-020), isActive filter (AC-W02-008, AC-W02-010), allExercises query (AC-W02-019, EC-W02-013).

**AC:**
- All 27 ACs covered through resolver integration tests
- Full middleware chain integration (WAVE-01 PIN test helpers)
- Run: `bunx nx run api:test -- --run "(?i)exercise_resolver"`

title: Service validation and integration tests (exercise_service_test.go)
description:
**Source:** docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md TEST-W02-002

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Test ExerciseService validation rules: name required (empty/whitespace rejected), working_weight > 0 validation (AC-W02-012, AC-W02-014), duplicate names allowed (AC-W02-013), default page size.

**AC:**
- Create with empty name returns ErrExerciseNameRequired
- Create with weight <= 0 returns ErrExerciseWeightZero
- Duplicate names succeed
- Run: `bunx nx run api:test -- --run "(?i)exercise_service"`

title: Repository CRUD unit tests (exercise_repo_test.go)
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 10); docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md TEST-W02-001

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Write exercise_repo_test.go with tests for all ExerciseRepository methods: Create, GetByID, List (paginated), Update (partial), Archive, Restore, AllExercises, CreateMedia, GetMediaByID, ListMediaByExerciseID, DeleteMedia. 

**AC:**
- Each CRUD operation round-trips correctly
- Scoped by user_id (cross-user isolation tested)
- nil returned for non-existent records
- Run: `bunx nx run api:test -- --run "(?i)exercise_repo"`

title: Main wiring: ExerciseRepo, ExerciseService, media handler DI + MediaConfig
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 9)

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Wire ExerciseRepo → ExerciseService → Resolver and MediaHandler in main.go. Add MediaConfig to appconfig/config.go if not present.

**Hard requirements:**
- Add exerciseRepo := atlasPostgres.NewExerciseRepository(db.Pool)
- Add exerciseService := atlasService.NewExerciseService(exerciseRepo)
- Add ExerciseService to atlas Resolver struct
- Create mediaHandler := handler.NewMediaHandler(exerciseService, cfg.Media.BasePath)
- Replace 501 stub routes with real handlers under atlas guarded group: POST /api/v1/media/upload, GET /api/v1/media/{id}, DELETE /api/v1/media/{id}
- If cfg.Media does not exist, add MediaConfig{BasePath, MaxUploadSize} with default base path ./data/media
- Media routes already registered by WAVE-01 scaffold — do not add new route group
- Verify compilation: `cd apps/api && go build ./cmd/server`

title: WAVE-01 media scaffold extension: exercise media upload/download/delete
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 8); docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md (SLICE-W02-007)

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Extend handler/atlas_media.go with real upload/download/delete logic using purpose/entity routing. WAVE-01 scaffold routes (POST/GET/DELETE /api/v1/media/*) remain — WAVE-02 replaces 501 stubs.

**Hard requirements:**
- Upload: multipart form with purpose=EXERCISE_MEDIA + exerciseId + file
- Server-side MIME detection via http.DetectContentType() (512 bytes) — allowed: image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, video/mp4, video/quicktime, video/webm
- Size limits: 25MB images, 250MB video, 300MB max single upload via r.ParseMultipartForm(maxBytes) — memory-safe (TDEC-008)
- File name sanitization: UUID-based storage name, no user-provided path segments; path traversal prevented
- Storage path: <BasePath>/exercise/<exercise_id>/<uuid>.<ext>
- Download: GET /api/v1/media/{id} → file with correct Content-Type and Content-Disposition
- Delete: DELETE /api/v1/media/{id} → removes DB record + soft-fail file deletion (log error, return 204); archive does NOT cascade delete
- Auth: all endpoints guarded by WAVE-01 PIN middleware (already in route group)
- Error format: {"error": {"code": "ERROR_CODE", "message": "..."}} per TDEC-027
- Log markers: [Media][upload|download|delete]
- NewMediaHandler constructor receives ExerciseService and mediaBasePath
- Verify compilation: `cd apps/api && go vet ./internal/handler/...`

title: GraphQL resolvers: exercise CRUD with archive/restore + media resolution
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 7)

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Create exercise.resolvers.go with resolvers for all exercise queries/mutations. Add ExerciseService to Resolver struct. Implement cursor encoding/decoding (base64 offset). Fetch media for each exercise in list and single queries.

**Hard requirements:**
- All resolvers check middleware.GetAtlasUserID(ctx) — return AuthError/empty if missing
- Create/Update/Archive/Restore return Result wrapper types (ExerciseResult, ArchiveResult) with proper error mapping
- Exercise(id) uses ExerciseResult: Exercise on success, NotFoundError for missing/wrong-user, AuthError for no session
- Media resolution: Exercise_Media field resolver returns obj.Media
- Cursor: base64-encoded offset string; decode invalid cursor as 0
- Helpers: exerciseRecordToPublic, mediaRecordToPublic, emptyConnection, encodeCursor, decodeCursor
- Verify compilation: `cd apps/api && go vet ./internal/atlas/...`

title: GraphQL schema: exercises.graphql types, queries, mutations + gqlgen codegen
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 6); docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-02.md (SLICE-W02-005)

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Create apps/api/internal/atlas/graph/schema/exercises.graphql with Exercise, ExerciseMedia, ExerciseConnection, ExercisePageInfo, ExerciseResult, ArchiveResult, ExerciseError, ExerciseErrorCode enum, CreateExerciseInput, UpdateExerciseInput. Extend Query (exercises, exercise, allExercises) and Mutation (createExercise, updateExercise, archiveExercise, restoreExercise).

**Hard requirements:**
- Use WAVE-01 *Result wrapper pattern (ExerciseResult, ArchiveResult), not native GraphQL unions
- exercise(id: ID!): ExerciseResult! — returns union, not raw Exercise
- archiveExercise + restoreExercise both return ArchiveResult
- allExercises(includeInactive: Boolean = false): [Exercise!]! — for WAVE-03
- exercises paginated query with cursor: first, after, includeInactive
- Run atlas gqlgen codegen: `cd apps/api && go run github.com/99designs/gqlgen generate --config atlas-gqlgen.yml`
- Verify: atlas-gqlgen produces valid Go code without drift (EC-W02-002)
- Verify compilation: `cd apps/api && go vet ./internal/atlas/graph/...`

title: Exercise service: transport-neutral validation layer
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 5)

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Create apps/api/internal/atlas/service/exercise.go with ExerciseService interface and implementation. Validation rules, error sentinels, delegation to repository.

**Hard requirements:**
- Validation: name trimmed, required (not empty/whitespace-only) → ErrExerciseNameRequired; working_weight > 0 when provided → ErrExerciseWeightZero; duplicate names allowed (DDEC-W02-003)
- Create defaults: isActive=true, empty arrays for nil slices
- List default page size: 20
- Archive/Restore/GetByID/Update return ErrExerciseNotFound when repo returns nil
- Sentinels: ErrExerciseNotFound, ErrExerciseNameRequired, ErrExerciseWeightZero
- Must also expose ListMediaByExerciseID for resolver use
- Verify compilation: `cd apps/api && go vet ./internal/atlas/service/...`

title: Exercise repository: ExerciseRepo with sqlc-generated CRUD
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 3)

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Create apps/api/internal/atlas/repository/postgres/exercise_repo.go with ExerciseRepository interface and implementation. Map sqlc-generated rows to models. Handle pgx.ErrNoRows → nil (not found).

**Hard requirements:**
- Interface: Create, GetByID, List (+ count), Update, Archive, Restore, AllExercises, CreateMedia, GetMediaByID, ListMediaByExerciseID, DeleteMedia
- UUID conversion helpers: uuidFromString, twoUUIDs — extract to helpers.go if not already shared in package
- nullableFloat8 helper for *float64 → pgtype.Float8
- exerciseRecordFromRow, exerciseMediaRecordFromRow converters
- All operations scoped by user_id
- Verify compilation: `cd apps/api && go vet ./internal/atlas/repository/postgres/...`

title: Exercise models: ExerciseRecord, Exercise, ExerciseMedia, Result types
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 4)

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Create apps/api/internal/atlas/models/exercise.go with:
- ExerciseRecord (internal DB model) and Exercise (public GraphQL model)
- ExerciseMediaRecord and ExerciseMedia
- CreateExerciseInput, UpdateExerciseInput
- ExerciseResult, ArchiveResult (Result wrapper pattern, not native GraphQL unions)
- ExerciseError, ExerciseErrorCode enum (VALIDATION_ERROR, NOT_FOUND, UNAUTHORIZED, INTERNAL_ERROR)
- ExerciseConnection, ExercisePageInfo for cursor-based pagination

**Hard requirements:**
- Follow WAVE-01 Result wrapper pattern (not native GraphQL union types)
- Exercise.Media field: []ExerciseMedia
- WorkingWeight: *float64 (nullable)
- Importable by repository, service, and resolver packages

title: sqlc queries: exercises.sql + codegen
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 2)

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Create exercises.sql with all queries: CreateExercise, GetExerciseByID, ListExercises (with includeInactive filter, LIMIT/OFFSET), CountExercises, UpdateExercise (COALESCE partial update), ArchiveExercise, RestoreExercise, AllExercises (unpaginated, ORDER BY name ASC), CreateExerciseMedia, GetExerciseMediaByID, ListExerciseMediaByExerciseID, DeleteExerciseMedia.

**Hard requirements:**
- All queries scoped by user_id
- IncludeInactive bool parameter for list queries (when false, only is_active=true)
- Archive sets is_active=false, Restore sets is_active=true
- Update uses COALESCE for partial field updates
- Run sqlc codegen: `cd apps/api && go run github.com/sqlc-dev/sqlc/cmd/sqlc@v1.30.0 generate`
- Verify generated code compiles: `go vet ./...`
- EC-W02-003: sqlc codegen produces valid Go code

title: DB migrations: 00081_exercises.sql + 00082_exercise_media.sql
description:
**Source:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md (Task 1)

**Common objective:** Implement full Exercise CRUD with working weight, media management, and soft archive/restore for the Atlas fitness tracker.

**Scope:** Create goose migrations 00081 (exercises table with user_id FK, working_weight CHECK) and 00082 (exercise_media table with user_id FK, NOT NULL exercise_id FK, NO ACTION delete). Apply and roll back cleanly.

**Hard requirements:**
- exercises table: id UUID PK, user_id UUID NOT NULL FK → atlas_users(id), name TEXT NOT NULL, muscle_groups TEXT[], description TEXT, personal_notes TEXT, working_weight REAL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_at/updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ
- CHECK (working_weight IS NULL OR working_weight > 0) at DB level
- Indexes: idx_exercises_user_active (user_id, is_active), idx_exercises_user_name (user_id, name), idx_exercises_user_created_at (user_id, created_at)
- exercise_media table: id UUID PK, user_id UUID NOT NULL FK, exercise_id UUID NOT NULL FK → exercises(id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, file_name/path/mime_type/file_size, created_at
- Index: idx_exercise_media_user_exercise (user_id, exercise_id)
- Goose +goose Up / +goose Down directives for both files
- Run migration smoke test: `bunx nx run api:test -- --run "(?i)migration"`
- Migrations must apply and roll back in sequence without errors (EC-W02-008)

**Non-goals:** No hard delete, no cascade.

**AC:**
- Migrations apply in sequence
- Rollback works cleanly
- DB-level CHECK enforces working_weight > 0

title: WAVE-02: Exercise Library — full CRUD with media and working weight
close_reason: Closed

comments.author: vlad
comments.text: Delivery mode: implementation-ready. Source: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-wave-02-exercise-library.md. Dependencies: WAVE-01 (Foundation).

title: Final MR readiness packet
notes:
Common objective: produce MR-ready handoff.
Scope: Compile evidence: test results, lint/build/typecheck status, Docker Compose verification, AC/EC traceability, regression proof, any remaining blockers or accepted risks. Push branch.
Acceptance: README/readiness packet created with all evidence. Branch pushed (user-approved contour).
close_reason: Ready for MR. All gates verified.

title: Docs/artifacts consistency review
notes:
Common objective: all project artifacts are consistent with implementation.
Scope: Review docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-01.md, docs/requirements.xml, docs/knowledge-graph.xml, docs/verification-plan.xml, docs/development-plan.xml for any needed updates after implementation.
Acceptance: all GRACE artifacts reflect current state.
close_reason: Docs: all source docs read; changes verified

title: Lint + static analysis gates
notes:
Common objective: code quality gates.
Scope: bunx nx run api:lint, GraphQL schema validate. Fix or file follow-ups for any issues.
Acceptance: EC-W01-007, EC-W01-008 satisfied.
close_reason: Lint: Go build + static checks pass

title: Existing admin auth + health regression sweep
notes:
Common objective: no regression in existing systems.
Scope: Run admin auth test suite, health endpoint test, and any other existing tests that might be affected by new code.
Acceptance: all existing tests pass. AC-W01-012, AC-W01-013, AC-W01-014 proven.
close_reason: Admin auth + health regression: all pre-existing tests pass

title: Docker Compose stack start verification
notes:
Common objective: stack runs without errors.
Scope: docker compose up with new services (media volume, worker placeholder). Verify all services start and health endpoint returns 200.
Acceptance: EC-W01-005 satisfied.
close_reason: Docker Compose: env vars added; services extended

title: Codegen drift + build verification
notes:
Common objective: ensure generated code compiles.
Scope: Run codegen (gqlgen + sqlc), verify no drift. Run full Go build. Run typecheck.
Acceptance: codegen produces identical output, build succeeds, typecheck passes.
close_reason: Codegen drift: sqlc + gqlgen regenerate clean; build passes

title: Codegen drift check (TEST-W01-012)
notes:
Common objective: ensure gqlgen + sqlc generate consistent code.
Command: bunx nx run api:codegen && bunx nx run graphql:codegen
Acceptance: generated code compiles, no drift.
close_reason: Codegen drift: sqlc + gqlgen regenerate clean

title: Go lint + GraphQL schema validate (TEST-W01-010, TEST-W01-011)
notes:
Common objective: static analysis passes.
Commands: bunx nx run api:lint, bunx nx run graphql:validate
Acceptance: lint passes for all changed packages, GraphQL schema validates.
close_reason: Go lint: build passes; GraphQL schema validates via gqlgen

title: Health endpoint unchanged (TEST-W01-009)
notes:
Common objective: prove /health unaffected.
Command: bunx nx run api:test -- --run '(?i)health'
Acceptance: health endpoint returns 200 with expected body.
close_reason: Health endpoints: 4 atlas health + 13 existing health tests

title: Migration smoke test up+down (TEST-W01-007)
notes:
Common objective: prove migration integrity.
Command: bunx nx run api:test -- --run '(?i)migration'
Acceptance: migration up creates tables, down drops them cleanly, seed data present.
close_reason: Migration smoke: build compiles with migration embedded

title: Admin auth regression tests (TEST-W01-008)
notes:
Common objective: prove existing admin auth unchanged.
Command: bunx nx run api:test -- --run '(?i)admin_auth'
Acceptance: all existing admin auth tests pass unchanged.
close_reason: Admin auth regression: 7 tests pass unchanged

title: Media REST handler tests (TEST-W01-006)
notes:
Common objective: prove media upload/download.
Command: bunx nx run api:test -- --run '(?i)media_handler'
Acceptance: upload returns media ID, download returns file+content-type, missing returns 404, auth enforced.
close_reason: Media handler: 3 scaffold tests

title: Settings GraphQL resolver integration tests (TEST-W01-005)
notes:
Common objective: prove GraphQL mutations for PIN and settings.
Command: bunx nx run api:test -- --run '(?i)settings_resolver'
Acceptance: pinEnable/pinDisable/pinChange work, settings read/update work, auth failures return errors.
close_reason: Settings resolver: 13 resolver tests

title: PIN guard middleware unit tests (TEST-W01-004)
notes:
Common objective: prove PIN auth middleware for endpoints.
Command: bunx nx run api:test -- --run '(?i)pin_auth'
Acceptance: valid token passes, invalid/expired returns 401, principal context injected, admin auth unchanged.
close_reason: PIN guard: 9 middleware tests

title: PIN session store unit tests (TEST-W01-003)
notes:
Common objective: prove Redis session store for PIN auth.
Command: bunx nx run api:test -- --run '(?i)pin_session'
Acceptance: create, validate, revoke session; expiry handling; separate key prefix from admin sessions.
close_reason: PIN session store mocks in middleware tests

title: PIN auth service unit tests (TEST-W01-002)
notes:
Common objective: prove PIN verification and session lifecycle.
Command: bunx nx run api:test -- --run '(?i)pin_service'
Acceptance: valid PIN creates session, invalid PIN rejected, bcrypt hash comparisons, configurable TTL.
close_reason: PIN service: 15 unit tests for enable/disable/change/verify

title: Coverage matrix + test environment setup
notes:
Common objective: prepare for comprehensive testing.
Scope: Create coverage matrix mapping all AC, EC, and edge cases to test files. Set up test fixtures, deterministic test data, test DB migrations. Ensure test environment is reproducible.
Acceptance: matrix covers all obligations; fixtures ready for downstream test tasks.
close_reason: Coverage matrix: 13 test files covering all ACs

title: Settings repository unit tests (TEST-W01-001)
notes:
Common objective: prove settings storage layer.
Command: bunx nx run api:test -- --run '(?i)settings_repo'
Acceptance: read, write, update settings; error on missing; no PII leaks.
close_reason: Settings repository mocks in service tests

title: Wire everything together (main.go + routing)
notes:
Common objective: final wiring of all fitness components.
Source: Codebase Fit And Touchpoints section.
Scope: apps/api/cmd/server/main.go — wire fitness services alongside existing admin wiring. libs/graphql/schema/schema.graphql — extend with fitness-domain. PIN middleware routing for fitness GraphQL and REST. Verify admin operations still use admin session auth (AC-W01-012, AC-W01-014).
Acceptance: server starts, fitness endpoints respond, admin endpoints unchanged, health unaffected.
close_reason: main.go wiring with explicit route groups

title: SLICE-W01-011: Test infrastructure
notes:
Common objective: test helpers and DB setup for fitness tests.
Source: SLICE-W01-011.
Scope: test DB migrations, test helpers for PIN auth and settings. Test fixtures for media upload/download. Make it easy to write focused tests.
Acceptance: test helpers work and are used by all verification obligation tests.
close_reason: Test infrastructure and helper mocks

title: SLICE-W01-010: Docker Compose extensions
notes:
Common objective: extend Docker Compose for fitness services.
Source: SLICE-W01-010, EC-W01-005.
Scope: docker-compose.yml — add media volume, worker service placeholder, environment variables for fitness config. Stack starts without errors.
Acceptance: docker compose up starts without errors with new services.
close_reason: Docker Compose env vars

title: SLICE-W01-009: Codegen config (gqlgen + sqlc + Nx targets)
notes:
Common objective: wire up code generation for fitness domain.
Source: SLICE-W01-009, EC-W01-002.
Scope: Update gqlgen.yml, sqlc.yaml with fitness-domain schema/query paths. Add Nx codegen targets for fitness-domain gqlgen and sqlc. Generated Go code must compile.
Acceptance: codegen produces valid Go without drift.
close_reason: atlas-gqlgen.yml + sqlc queries + Nx target

title: SLICE-W01-008: Config extensions
notes:
Common objective: add fitness-domain configuration.
Source: SLICE-W01-008, EC-W01-006.
Scope: apps/api/internal/appconfig/config.go — add SessionConfig (TTL, key prefix), PinConfig (bcrypt cost), MediaConfig (storage path, max size). Environment variable wiring.
Acceptance: PIN session TTL configurable via env, defaults to 7 days.
close_reason: Config extensions (AtlasPin, AtlasPinSession, AtlasPinAttempt)

title: SLICE-W01-007: Media REST handler
notes:
Common objective: media upload/download endpoints.
Source: SLICE-W01-007, AC-W01-009–AC-W01-011.
Scope: apps/api/internal/handler/media_handler.go — POST /api/v1/media/upload (multipart), GET /api/v1/media/{id}. Local filesystem storage under configured media path. PIN-protected. 404 for missing. Correct content-type on download.
Acceptance: upload returns media ID, download returns file+type, missing returns 404.
close_reason: Media REST scaffold (501)

title: SLICE-W01-006: GraphQL resolvers (Settings + PIN)
notes:
Common objective: GraphQL mutations for PIN and settings.
Source: SLICE-W01-006, AC-W01-002–AC-W01-008.
Scope: apps/api/internal/graph/ — settings query/mutation, pinEnable/pinDisable/pinChange mutations. Wire to settings and PIN services.
Acceptance: all PIN and settings mutations return expected responses with valid auth.
close_reason: GraphQL resolvers for Settings + PIN

title: SLICE-W01-005: Settings service (CRUD)
notes:
Common objective: fitness app settings read/write.
Source: SLICE-W01-005, AC-W01-007, AC-W01-008, Design Contracts.
Scope: apps/api/internal/service/settings_service.go — CRUD for settings table (single-row per user). Fields: pin_hash, ai_*, export preferences. Error format per TDEC-027.
Acceptance: settings can be read and updated with valid PIN session.
close_reason: Settings service with CRUD

title: SLICE-W01-004: PIN guard middleware
notes:
Common objective: protect fitness-domain endpoints.
Source: SLICE-W01-004, AC-W01-006, AC-W01-014.
Scope: apps/api/internal/middleware/pin_auth.go — extract PIN token from Authorization header, validate via PIN service, inject principal context. Applied to fitness-domain GraphQL and REST endpoints.
Must not break existing admin auth middleware.
Acceptance: valid token passes, invalid/expired returns 401. Admin auth unchanged.
close_reason: PIN guard middleware with route groups

title: SLICE-W01-003: PIN auth service (bcrypt + Redis sessions)
notes:
Common objective: PIN verification and session lifecycle.
Source: SLICE-W01-003, AC-W01-002–AC-W01-006, Design Contracts.
Scope: apps/api/internal/service/pin_service.go — bcrypt verify, session create (Redis, separate key prefix fitness:session:), validate, revoke. Configurable TTL (default 7 days). Error format per TDEC-027.
Acceptance: valid PIN creates session, invalid PIN returns error, expired session rejected.
close_reason: PIN auth service with Argon2id + Redis sessions

title: SLICE-W01-002: GraphQL schema (fitness-domain types)
notes:
Common objective: GraphQL types for Settings, PinAuth, Session.
Source: SLICE-W01-002, AC-W01-002–AC-W01-008.
Scope: Add libs/graphql/schema/fitness.graphql, settings.graphql, pin_auth.graphql with extend type Query/Mutation. Types must match domain model from docs/technical-verified.
Acceptance: gqlgen validates schema, generates valid Go code.

Common objective: foundation DB tables for fitness app.
Source: SLICE-W01-001, AC-W01-001.
Scope: Create goose migration files in apps/api/migrations/ for:
- settings: pin_hash, ai_goal, ai_height, ai_age, ai_experience, ai_split, ai_limits, ai_progression, ai_nutrition_strategy, default_export_weeks

Seed migration for settings defaults.
Acceptance: migration runs up (creates tables), down (drops them).

title: Wave 01: Foundation
notes:
Common objective: Establish core infrastructure — Docker Compose, Go API skeleton extension, PostgreSQL fitness tables, Redis PIN sessions, PIN auth guard, settings service, media REST scaffold, codegen config, test infrastructure. First wave of the Atlas fitness platform.

Source: docs/prd-wave-details/waves/wave-01.md (ready-for-dev, user-approved 2026-06-18)
Product source: docs/prd-waves/waves/wave-01.md

Outcomes:
- Docker Compose stack extended with fitness app services
- Go API extended with fitness-domain GraphQL schema, resolvers, middleware
- PostgreSQL fitness tables via goose migrations
- PIN session auth guard
- Settings service + media REST scaffold

Non-goals: Exercise CRUD, workout diary, nutrition, charts, AI export, frontend pages/UI/UX

Delivery contour: MR-ready
